personalInfo.name: Lance Jacob
personalInfo.role: Computer Science Student | Aspiring Embedded AI Engineer
personalInfo.biography: I am a Computer Science student and Data Lead passionate about building intelligent, data-driven solutions. I specialize in engineering robust data pipelines and architecting AI-powered systems, with experience ranging from research-focused data engineering to full-stack platform development. My work focuses on creating efficient, machine-learning-integrated applications that solve complex real-world challenges through data-informed innovation.
